---
name: Bug Report
about: Report incorrect, outdated, or misleading skill content
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Skill Affected

Which skill has the issue? (e.g., `citation-formatter`, `statistical-reporting`)

## Bug Description

A clear description of what is wrong.

## Expected Behavior

What should the skill do/say?

## Actual Behavior

What does the skill actually do/say?

## Reproduction Steps

1. Trigger: "..."
2. Skill response: "..."
3. Problem: "..."

## Evidence

If the skill content is factually incorrect, please provide a reference:
- Source (e.g., APA Publication Manual, 7th ed., p. 198)
- URL (if applicable)

## Severity

- [ ] Critical — Skill gives harmful or seriously wrong advice
- [ ] High — Skill content is factually incorrect
- [ ] Medium — Skill content is outdated or misleading
- [ ] Low — Minor improvement suggestion

## Tool Used

- [ ] Claude Code
- [ ] Gemini CLI
- [ ] Cursor IDE
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional Context

Any other information that would help fix this issue.
